title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Flipkart Books - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
